content.speakerText: Thanks for the insights—I’ll definitely check out your paper.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你的分享，我一定会看你的论文。
expectedAnswers: That means a lot—I’ll send you the link after the conference!
I’m so glad you found it helpful! I’ll email you the PDF tomorrow.
Awesome, thanks! I’ll share the paper with my research group too.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感谢并主动提供后续行动
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用了恰当的礼貌表达
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常回应习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'send link', 'after conference', 'glad/helpful' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Any chance we can connect over coffee next week?
content.speakerTextCn: 下周有空一起喝杯咖啡聊聊吗？
expectedAnswers: Absolutely! My email’s on the poster—I’ll reach out to schedule.
Definitely! I’m on LinkedIn—just send me a request. I’m free Thursday afternoon.
That sounds great! How about next Wednesday? I’m available after 3 PM.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应邀约并提出具体安排
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'reach out', 'schedule', 'free on' 等表达
表达自然度：是否避免 'maybe' 或模糊回应，语气是否热情友好
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'LinkedIn', 'schedule', 'free', 'reach out' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate your time today.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你今天抽出时间。
expectedAnswers: It was my pleasure—I look forward to staying in touch!
Thank you for your thoughtful questions! Let’s connect soon via email.
I truly enjoyed our chat—I’ll follow up with the resources I mentioned.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感谢并延续关系
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的句型如 'It was my pleasure', 'look forward to', 'follow up'
表达自然度：是否避免机械回应如 'You're welcome'，是否体现情感温度
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'stay in touch', 'follow up', 'connect', 'enjoyed' 等总结致谢关键词
